title: Bug Spray doubles attack damage to Bug targets

card.rawText: All creatures inflict 2x Atk damage to Bug-type creatures on the field.

plan.title: Bug Spray doubles attack damage to Bug targets
plan.summary: With Bug Spray active as field magic, a creature attacking a Bug-type target deals 2x attack damage.

notes: Pre-place Bug Spray in an active field magic slot.
Use Bug Man as player_2 primary Bug-type target.
Ensure not in first turn cycle.

steps: Player 1 attacks Bug Man while Bug Spray is field-active.
Inspect damage event multiplier and defender HP loss.

expectedAssertions.label: Bug target took doubled attack damage

manualVerification: Confirm non-Bug targets are not doubled in a separate variant.
riskNotes: This mirrors the Holy Water and Exorcism field-aura route with a Bug target predicate.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Bug Spray's Bug damage multiplier aura.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
